name: Maraschino Hearts
recipeInstructions: Cream shortening, butter, and sugar. Beat in egg. Gradually combine flour, baking powder, and salt with the creamed mixture; mix well. Wrap dough in waxed paper and refrigerate for about 2 hours. Roll dough to a thickness of 3/8 inch. Cut into heart shapes using a 2 1/2-inch cookie cutter. Place on an ungreased baking sheet. Push in the center with your thumb, placing about six chocolate chips in each thumbprint. Bake at 376°F for 6 to 8 minutes or until set. Transfer to a cooling rack and press one maraschino cherry into melted chocolate in each thumbprint. Allow to cool until the chocolate is set. Makes 18 to 24 cookies.
